title: Restore Chat Links
body:
Process in game chat for web links to be made clickable

Chat type includes
- Game message
- Player chat message
- Player direct message
- Non-player announcement (such as command block `/say`)

**Note:** Tested with no chat modification. Mods/Plugins that alter chat messages may affect its correctness.

#### Important: 1.19.3+ versions highly recommends Fabric API to be installed. 


**[Forge Config Api Port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port/)** is required to modify configuration **in Fabric**. Defaults will be used when it is not available.  

> **1.19.3-0.2.0+** requires at least **version 5.0.5** if available (as an optional dependency)  
>
> **1.19.2-0.1.4** requires at least **version 4.2.10** if available (as an optional dependency)  
>
> **1.19.2-0.1.3** requires and supports only **version 4.2.9**

Therefore, the web link style is configurable and it's located in `./config/restorechatlinks-client.toml`
   
    
For Minecraft 1.19.2+

#### Client Side Only


<details>
<summary>Jar Signing Info</summary>
  
Applies to 1.19.3+ and above.
